text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Haru Urara seems sluggish during practice today.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow... That cloud looks just like you, Trainer...
choice_data_list: You're a little spacey today, huh?
You're a little spacey today, huh?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Right... Y'know, it's weird. Recently, I've been
feeling heavy as a rock.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like it might be best to rearrange her
race schedule...
